comment: Retrieval fixtures: query notes with expected related/unrelated notes. Used by evals/retrieval.ts to tune the similarity floor empirically.

notes.text: skipped the gym, work ran late again
couldn't work out, stuck at the office until 9pm
big deadline this week, no time to exercise
slept terribly, couldn't get up for my morning run
exhausted all day, went to bed without journaling
traveling for a wedding, no gym access at the hotel
airport day, everything fell apart schedule-wise
friends came over, we ended up drinking instead
just didn't feel like it today, no real reason
almost skipped but did a short 20 minute session anyway
back at it after missing yesterday, felt great
read 25 pages before bed, new personal best
meditated 10 minutes after coffee like planned

cases.query: missed the workout, meetings went way over
too tired this morning, snoozed through my alarm
on the road this week, hotel has no equipment
